title: Loaf Pigeon Totem
description: totem of undying and flaming skull replaced by a cute wood pigeon
body:
totem of undying and flaming skull replaced by a cute wood pigeon. thats all 


(i know it says its not compatible cuz i made it a while ago but it does work on the newest version
, i posted it on planetminecraft but i came back to upload it to modrinth and make the 512x version might also upload some of my other packs (I OWN THE PICTURE OF THE PIGEON I TOOK IT MYSELF ITS VADER THE WOOD PIGEON FROM MY NEIGHBORHOOD)
